description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:266-283. The block 'These tests are written TDD-style: the K8sBackend struct and from_uri() do not exist yet' is stale — both struct and method exist above the comment. A reader of the committed file is left wondering what to do. Delete the block; the test cases below speak for themselves.
title: Doc-comment 'TDD-style' block in lib.rs is stale and confusing
